intent: Write a tradeoff analysis for a small-apartment dweller deciding between a vacuum, a steam mop, or a handheld cordless — $150 ceiling. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and health-household categories and collect 1-2 products per cleaning device type (so 3-6 total). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips for posts on which cleaning tool matters most in small spaces, multi-use hacks, or regrets. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) table the three device categories with storefront stats, (b) extract community rules about small-space cleaning, (c) pick ONE device as the best $150 spend and defend it against the other two. Cite every claim.
